articles.title: Suspect arrested in stabbing near Northeastern University
articles.description:
Stephen Dantzler, 58, was expected to be charged with assault and battery with a dangerous weapon, police said.

The post Suspect arrested in stabbing near Northeastern University appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stephen Dantzler, 58, arrested for stabbing near Northeastern University on April 2.
Dantzler faces charges of assault and battery with a dangerous weapon.
Incident raises safety concerns for students and residents in the area.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum star in blowout Celtics win over Heat: 6 takeaways
articles.description:
“Usually when you’re in moments like that, you take poor shots,” Joe Mazzulla said afterward. “We didn’t do that. We kept fighting for good looks, the next best look. I thought that kind of kept the momentum going a bit.”

The post Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum star in blowout Celtics win over Heat: 6 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated the Heat with a dominant performance on April 2, 2026.
Jaylen Brown and Jayson Tatum led the team, contributing significantly to the victory.
This win boosts Celtics' playoff positioning, enhancing local fan excitement.

articles.title: Ask the remodeler: Weighing return on investment vs. marketability of home remodels
articles.description:
What’s more important? Selling quickly or making a profit?

The post Ask the remodeler: Weighing return on investment vs. marketability of home remodels appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Homeowners in Boston face tough choices between quick sales and profit from remodels.
Remodeling projects can yield varying returns, affecting marketability in a competitive market.
Local residents must consider ROI to maximize home value before selling.
